title: FINGOOO Halloween Slow Rising Squishes Toys, 6 packs Cute Squishy Toys Assorted Pumpkin Zombie Skeleton Wizard Black Cat Bat Gift Party Favour for Kids
features: CUTE HALLOWEEN SLOW RISING TOYS- This value-packed set includes 6 slow-rising squeeze toys featuring everyone's favourite Halloween characters - a grinning pumpkin, spooky skeleton, mischievous black cat, classic vampire, flapping bat, and bandaged mummy, offering perfect variety for gifting or collecting.

CUTE DESIGN- Style Designs Each playful character boasts vibrant, detailed printing that captures the Halloween spirit without being frightening, with exaggerated cute features that make these the perfect introductory spooky toys for young children while still delighting older kids.

IDEAL SIZE- Designed for perfect one-handed play, these generously sized slow rising toys are substantial enough for satisfying squeezes yet compact enough for small hands to easily manipulate, measuring approximately 4-5 inches tall depending on character shape.

MATERIAL- Premium Slow-Rise Foam Material Made from high-quality viscoelastic foam that offers that uniquely satisfying slow-return action, these durable toys provide calming sensory input and can withstand endless squishing without losing their shape or rebound properties.

APPLICATIONS- Ultimate Halloween Party Essential Perfect as non-candy trick or treat alternatives, classroom prizes, party bag stuffers, or stocking stuffers, these multifunctional toys combine stress relief with festive fun for Halloween celebrations, school events, and sensory play all season long.
description: Product description Halloween Squishes Toys, 6 packs Slow Rising Toys Assorted Pumpkin Zombie Skeleton Wizard Black Cat Bat Gift Party Favour for Kids Safety Warning kids use it under adults' supervision
